# elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram Daily Update (May 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for May 2, 2026, focused on addressing configuration management within the Telegram plugin, specifically targeting runtime token handling.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#29](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-telegram/pull/29): fix: apply Telegram setup token at runtime. This PR introduces a fix to ensure the Telegram setup token is applied during runtime execution.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*None*

## NEW ISSUES
*None*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*None*
